overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a highway shoulder in a game engine environment (GTA V style). The scene features steady traffic flow with various commercial trucks and cars passing by, large transmission towers, and hilly terrain with sparse vegetation under clear midday sun. The character eventually turns off the road into a dirt hillside area.

events.description: large orange tanker truck passes by on the right
white box truck with red lettering passes on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the gravel shoulder parallel to the highway traffic

notable_agents.action: black semi-truck with trailer driving past on the highway

entered.detail: large metal lattice electricity pylon with concrete base
overhead highway sign structure spanning across the road
multiple high-voltage power lines running parallel to the highway
steep hill covered with dry grass and low shrubs
rocky terrain with sparse vegetation rising above the highway
back of a rectangular road sign on a metal pole

segments.scene_description: Walking along a gravel highway shoulder with steady traffic flowing past on the right. A large transmission tower dominates the left side, gradually approaching as the camera moves forward. The highway gantry sign structure looms ahead while vehicles including trucks and cars pass by continuously. The terrain consists of grassy hillsides on the left and rocky slopes on the right under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt hillside off the main highway

events.description: turns left off the highway shoulder onto the dirt hillside terrain

agents.ego_description: turns left away from the highway and walks up the dirt slope into the hillside area

entered.detail: unpaved dirt and gravel ground surface with scattered rocks
small weathered wooden structure on the hillside
cluster of green leafy trees and bushes on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left off the paved highway shoulder onto a dirt hillside, leaving the main road behind. The terrain becomes rough and unpaved as the camera moves toward a small hilltop shack visible among scrub trees. The highway gantry sign recedes into the distance on the right while the transmission tower is no longer visible. The scene shifts from the structured roadside to a more natural, undeveloped hillside area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a busy highway shoulder into a secluded, undeveloped hillside. It begins by moving along a gravel roadside under a bright midday sun, passing a towering transmission tower and a highway gantry sign as steady traffic flows by on the right. As the camera progresses, the structured environment of the road and its rocky slopes gives way to a leftward turn off the pavement. The scene then shifts onto rough, unpaved terrain, leaving the receding highway and traffic behind in favor of a natural landscape. Finally, the camera moves through scrub trees toward a small hilltop shack, completing the transition from the industrial roadside to a quiet rural setting.
